description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated human figure with knees drawn up to the chest and arms wrapped around the legs, creating a compact, introspective pose. The figure is rendered in a smooth, pale material, possibly stone or resin, with subtle anatomical details such as defined muscles and a simplified facial structure. The back of the sculpture is rounded and broad, with visible textural markings and what appears to be faint inscriptions or surface text. There is a notable hollow or damage on the upper back and shoulder area, exposing the interior. The figure sits atop a rectangular plinth, which is set on a larger, flat base that appears to be made of a different, slightly reflective material. The overall impression is one of contemplation and stillness, with the form inviting viewers to walk around and observe from multiple angles.
description: A smooth, pale sculpture of a seated human figure with arms wrapped around the knees, positioned on a rectangular plinth. The form is compact and introspective, with subtle anatomical details and a visible hollow on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, arms wrapped around the knees, and the compact seated posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and leg, as well as the curvature of the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad back, faint surface text, and a visible hollow or damage on the upper shoulder.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the head, arm, and leg, with the hollow on the back more prominent.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is placed on a flat, paved surface, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting.
